manual_entry_template.ready_condition: manual_confirmed=true and manual_confirmed_source_url is an exact product detail URL on an allowed source domain; manual_confirmed_image_url may be filled only after the product image is verified on that exact page.

rejected_source_url_patterns: category, ranking, cart, favorite, or account pages
confirmation_checks: catalog row title or Japanese name matches the product detail page title
character, variant, size, and goods type match the catalog row
product image on the page depicts the same exact item or explicitly confirmed variant
source_url_review_guidance.image_url_rule: manual_confirmed_image_url may be filled only from the confirmed product detail page or its directly referenced product image asset.

work_order.description: Open the first domain-limited query for each row and look for an exact 엔스카이 product detail page.
If web search is weak, open the official 엔스카이 search URL and inspect product-detail results manually.
Only after exact identity is confirmed, fill manual_confirmed_source_url/manual_evidence_url and run the dry-run importer.
